ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data was collected */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population (e.g., Female, Male) */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the given year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the given year */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 0-14, 15-64, 65+) */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death (e.g., Heart Disease, Cancer) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., State Health Department, Census Data) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality or reliability of the data (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., AL for Alabama) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state (e.g., South, Northeast) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race category (e.g., Black or African American) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race category */,
  "population_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the population belonging to the race */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the race data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("record_id")
)
